title: Attack of Higashimachi Nichome, 2nd borough
overview: Three aliens come to a cardboard Earth to invade.

title: From the Other Side of the Tears
overview: A sad young girl recovers from a heartache.

title: Kyottoko - Blaze Man
overview: A group of native warriors attack a giant kami in the shape of a bear. The kami sets one of the warriors on fire spiritually.

title: Sancha Blues (The Aromatic Tea Blues)
overview: An avaricious record-store owner watches greedily as patrons look through his records.

title: Alien Invasion from Space. Hiroshi's Case
overview: Hiroshi tries to read his manga but a small robot is shooting pellets to distract him so the robot can escape.

title: Project_Mermaid
overview: A fish turns into a mermaid who swims out into a post-apocalyptic city.

title: Yurururu - Ordinary Chapter
overview: An animator spends the whole day animating a 1-second clip of a giant fish in a city.

title: Gyrocopter
overview: A young gyrocopter pilot visits a pool of water and remembers a gyrocopter battle and the death of a friend on a watery planet.

title: Sport Captain Episode No.18: Assassin Descended from the Mountain Hunt!!
overview: A superhero comic book character and Tomoo's idol from Tobira Oda's manga, Danchi Tomoo. Who has his meal stolen by a cat after being attacked by a villain (his master's daughter). Then he imagines about his master (Paul) scaring the cats. Then he falls into a river and chased by his sidekick (The Bear and The Crow) and drifts over a waterfall.

title: Wandaba Kiss
overview: A young boy and his dog initiate a complex Rube Goldberg machine to steal a kiss from a young girl.

title: A Gathering of Cats
overview: The family cat (Chobi) has had his tail stepped on one too many times and dreams of revenge.

title: The Secret Agent Princess
overview: A magical girl and her doll must defeat an invading horde of air pirates.

title: The Big Race
overview: A group of children run across fields and play with a giant scary robot.

title: Project Omega
overview: As an alien force hurtles toward NHK headquarters in Tokyo, the NHK building springs to life as an evangelion-transformer to battle the foe.

title: Good Morning
overview: A young girl gets up from bed and sleepily tries to awaken herself.
